isi.lyrics_timestamp:
[Intro: Ashnikko & Konomi Suzuki]
Transforming the pain and rewriting your name
Zero modori mata saisei
Lost in the hollows unmei maware, ikinokore

[Verse 1: Ashnikko]
I know the fate that awaits
Change, reforge, remake, renew
Make me myth, make me legend
Die and I reboot
Everything I do for you
Go and wield me like a weapon
Let me meet my doom

[Pre-Chorus: Konomi Suzuki]
Oh tokasu koto kurikaeshite mo
Zetsubou ni aragae
Ah, oh
Inochi kakinashite

[Chorus: Konomi Suzuki & Ashnikko]
Na wo nakushite mo
Boku wa aru zo
Hon no naka hibiku wa riaru
Ai no kotae saki tsunaida
(Break it, burn it, save it)
Sora bare
(Yeah)

[Post-Chorus: Konomi Suzuki & Ashnikko]
Konrinzai
Get you so ready to crave
Mou ikkai
Standing in the desert sand
Kono toki ga
Say my name, we're ending this now (Watch it!)
You're gonna face more than anyone
Die and living agero, get up
Rip the fabric of reality
Let the magic stitch you back together (Oh)
One, two, three, four

[Bridge:Konomi Suzuki]
Nigeru kokyuu no kage
Hibiwareta kimi no kage oh, woah
Mushoku ni naru koe oh
Inochi tsuzukete kioku ga tayu

[Verse 2: Ashnikko]
Resurrect when I die
Nothing to lose when I fight
I respawn in the night
I- I- I- I- I- I’ll combine
Change me, make me divine
Crystalline, honest eyes
Loving you summertime
Under glaring sky
Breaking incantation
Chase before I can’t play dead
Screeching so I can’t stay down
Breaking burdens today

[Pre-Chorus: Konomi Suzuki & Ashnikko]
Ah, oh
Inochi kakinashite

[Chorus: Konomi Suzuki & Ashnikko]
Zenbu kiete mo koko ni
Iru yo inori no naka
Meguru haguruma
Kasaneau sen aishitanda
(Break it, burn it, save it)
Na wo nakushite mo
Boku wa aru zo
Hon no naka hibiku wa riaru
Ai no kotae saki tsunaida
(Break it, burn it, save it)
Sora bare

[Post-Chorus: Konomi Suzuki & Ashnikko]
Konrinzai
Get you so ready to crave
Mou ikkai
Standing in the desert sand
Kono toki ga
Say my name, we're ending this now (Watch it!)
You're gonna face more than anyone
Die and living agero, get up

[Outro:Konomi Suzuki]
Ah, oh-oh-ah
Sonzai sura oishii ka
Mou sutetai ka
Kasaneta ai kara sa
Recollect now
